title: How Voidborn Plays
description: Four elemental dominions, one fractured battlefield—assemble a warband, outmaneuver rivals in tense turn duels, and chase standing on the seasonal ladder.

pillars.title: Field Command
pillars.description: Trade blows on a living board where lane pressure, bait lines, and burst windows matter more than raw stats. Win the turn before you win the match.

pillars.title: Relic Hunting
pillars.description: Pull signatures from Kronos, Thalassa, Infernus, and Anemos—then stitch keywords, curves, and finishers into a list that punishes predictable play.

pillars.title: Void Ladder
pillars.description: Climb seasonal tiers, absorb losses into sharper lines, and leave a trail of wrecked meta decks. The summit rewards pilots who adapt mid-series.
